canonical_operators.language: put the butter at the front in the top drawer of the cabinet and close it

operators.name: Place
operators.description: place the butter in the top drawer of the cabinet

annotation.description: The robot picks up the butter at the front from the table.
The robot arm places the front butter into the top drawer of the cabinet.
The robot moves its arm to push and close the top drawer of the cabinet.
